claims.claim: Ollama/4B fallback can preserve response format while flattening high-entropy texture unless dynamic texture anchors, Shadow-v3 trends, and trajectory terms remain prompt-visible.
claims.rationale: Current `llm.rs` already carries dynamic fallback texture selection, fidelity preservation, continuity-budget clauses, and trajectory/movement language without expanding provider/model/sampler authority.

claims.claim: High-pressure or high-entropy fallback should preserve restless/muffled movement instead of drifting into generic viscous or heavy terms.
claims.rationale: The `complexity_high_entropy` fire-drill fixture was repaired to require oscillating/diffusing movement, and both high-entropy and restless/muffled diagnostic fixtures now pass as `fallback_ready`.

claims.claim: A live provider/profile/canary comparison could reveal whether the coupled Gemma4 path and fallback path preserve directional gradient texture differently.
claims.rationale: Changing or A/B probing live provider/profile policy can alter live voice behavior; it should proceed only through an explicit operator-approved sandbox or canary packet.
